title: AI Backbone Framework And Parallel Hardening Authoring
objective: Author the bounded framework docs that admit Codex for first-pass design and scaffold authoring of the current Olares AI backbone while defining a separate safe parallel hardening slice around `apex-jobs`, provenance, MCP boundary rules, and canary evidence.
dependency_note: The current repo already has an admitted minimal MCP trio and a repo-owned AI orchestration decision surface, but it lacks a current backbone-framework pack that turns those decisions into a bounded Codex-ready scaffold lane. The repo also lacks a named adjacent hardening slice that can run in parallel without reopening broader orchestration-service admission.
execution_scope: Author a repo-owned AI backbone framework document that fixes the bounded Codex first-pass role.
Author a scaffold specification that defines the exact first-pass surfaces and non-goals.
Author a Codex execution brief and a parallel hardening brief.
Update the current orchestration decision surface, authority index, and project status so the new pack is routed explicitly.
success_criteria: The repo has a written authority surface that admits Codex only for bounded first-pass design and scaffold authoring.
The repo has a written scaffold specification for the admitted AI backbone surfaces.
The repo has a written adjacent hardening brief that can run in parallel without widening the admitted runtime boundary.
Current authority and status surfaces route readers to the new framework pack explicitly.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path docs/authority/OLARES-AI-BACKBONE-FRAMEWORK-2026-05-08.md -Pattern '^# Olares AI Backbone Framework$','^## First-Pass Codex Admission$','^## Parallel Hardening Split$'

Select-String -Path docs/architecture/OLARES-AI-BACKBONE-SCAFFOLD-SPEC-2026-05-08.md -Pattern '^# Olares AI Backbone Scaffold Specification$','^## Allowed Output Classes$','^## Explicit Non-Goals For This Spec$'

Select-String -Path docs/operations/CODEX-AI-BACKBONE-FIRST-PASS-EXECUTION-BRIEF-2026-05-08.md -Pattern '^# Codex AI Backbone First-Pass Execution Brief$','^## Hard Constraints$','^## Done Definition$'

Select-String -Path docs/operations/AI-BACKBONE-PARALLEL-HARDENING-BRIEF-2026-05-08.md -Pattern '^# AI Backbone Parallel Hardening Brief$','^## Parallel Hardening Objectives$','^## Coordination Rules$'
next_action: Open one bounded execution packet for the Codex first-pass scaffold lane or one bounded packet for the adjacent backbone hardening lane, but do not collapse both into a single runtime-widening change set.
